CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Set For Trial On Feb-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephen J. Schori, Esq., from Joseph Costella & Associates, 925-945-4228, for defendant and moving party

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ARMENTA PROPERTIES I, LLC AND MARK ARMENTA'S Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination is Granted. Substantial evidence supports the finding that the settlement is in the ballpark under Tech-Bilt and the objector fails to show that the settlement lacks good faith. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; not reported.
